characters.name: 수아
characters.body: A full-body silhouette of a Korean woman with an hourglass figure and a slim waist. She is captured from a side profile, wearing a tight-fitting long-sleeved top and a high-waisted mini skirt that emphasizes her body curves. Her posture is upright and confident as she walks, with one arm slightly back and the other forward. She has a glamorous body proportion with a voluminous chest and balanced hips, creating a soft yet structured silhouette against a neutral urban background.
